summary: CI/CD → Control Plane integration hardening features fully verified. All 14 backend tests passed (deploy-trend, deploys, deploy-stats, record deploy, booking_adapter import fix). Frontend Deploy Dashboard working with trend chart, stat cards, environment breakdown, deploy history with smoke test badges and expandable rows.

issues: i18n translation keys showing briefly before translation loads (common.welcome, auth.signIn) - known pre-existing issue

critical_code_review_comments: Backend deploy_tracker.py get_deploy_trend() correctly aggregates daily deploy counts with success/failure/rollback breakdown
Backend dashboard_router.py /api/ops/dashboard/deploy-trend endpoint correctly accepts days parameter (1-90)
Frontend DeployDashboard.jsx DeployTrendChart component renders Recharts BarChart with stacked success/failure bars
Frontend DeployRow component correctly shows smoke test badge with pass/total count (e.g., 1/1, 3/3)
booking_adapter.py import fix verified - 'from _legacy.booking_availability' works correctly
seed_data_creation: Created 1 test deploy event via pytest (test-trend-env environment)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Deploy tracker feature with trend chart fully verified. Four API endpoints working: POST /api/ops/deploys, GET /api/ops/dashboard/deploys, GET /api/ops/dashboard/deploy-stats, GET /api/ops/dashboard/deploy-trend. Frontend renders at /control-plane with Deploy tab (data-testid='tab-deploys'). Deploy dashboard shows 4 stat cards, trend chart (Recharts BarChart), environment breakdown cards, and deploy history list with expandable rows showing smoke test results. 9 deploy events in DB. booking_adapter.py import fix verified.

GET /api/ops/dashboard/deploy-trend.returns: {trend: [{date, total, success, failure, rollbacks}], days: N}
